brand.name: OGPass
brand.sourceImageRole: Visual DNA reference for a playful premium AI-product interface, not product content to copy.
brand.coreMetaphor: A private AI companion living in a bright sky vault above an organic green horizon.

productTranslation.toOGPass: Carry your AI agent. Keep its memory private.

canvas.outerFrame: no visible browser-stage or grey outside background; sky canvas fills the viewport
canvas.mainSurface: single immersive full-bleed sky-blue application canvas
canvas.background: clear morning sky with soft clouds and a low meadow/hill band at the bottom
canvas.depth: foreground cards float over the sky, with very soft shadows and generous empty air

composition.layout: asymmetric editorial landing: left stacked cards, center oversized serif headline, right/low dashboard panel
composition.heroPositioning: headline sits high-center, cards overlap into the visual field
composition.dashboardTranslation: protected app keeps sky canvas but uses rounded translucent panels as real work surfaces
composition.spacing: wide gutters, large vertical breathing room, content grouped into islands

body.style: clean neo-grotesk sans with tight forms

microcopy.style: small dense labels in muted ink or black pills
microcopy.case: sentence case for product copy, uppercase only for tiny labels

shapes.buttonShape: black rounded pill with circular yellow icon bay
shapes.dashboardPanels: large frosted rounded panels with low opacity border

navigation.desktop: floating pill nav; brand pill left, text links center, segmented privacy/team or wallet pill right
navigation.mobile: brand pill and wallet/connect pill stack; center links collapse into compact row
navigation.brandMark: small organic asterisk/flower mark before wordmark

iconsAndMotifs.iconStyle: thin black line icons inside white/yellow/black pills
iconsAndMotifs.emojiUse: large single organic emoji-like accents permitted only in hero, not operational panels

cards.leftFeatureCard: white rounded card with frosted inner module and a single strong action pill
cards.metricCard: white rounded card with oversized figure and foreground cutout/illustration in reference; translated to real readiness metrics
cards.dashboardCard: blue frosted panel anchored near bottom, with rows and right-side pills

motion.entry: gentle rise/fade for cards and hero text
motion.ambient: slow cloud drift and subtle meadow parallax
motion.interaction: buttons compress slightly, yellow icon bay rotates or nudges

copyVoice.headline: short, poetic, ownership-centered
copyVoice.supporting: plain security promises, no fake metrics
copyVoice.cta: Create passport / Connect wallet / Open passport
copyVoice.dashboard: operational but still warm: encrypted memory, agent identity, compute trace
